texto: Usually when I start a new project there's a fear of the unknown; maybe it's a band I've never been in the studio with before. People are so different. It's almost like you need to go through the process, discover and unlock what it is that makes that band that band. And a lot of times they don't know it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rick Rubin: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Usually when I start a new project there's a fear of the unknown; maybe it's a band I've never be…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, start, people pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de people e unknown.

frase_original: Usually when I start a new project there's a fear of the unknown; maybe it's a band I've never been in the studio with before. People are so different. It's almost like you need to go through the process, discover and unlock what it is that makes that band that band. And a lot of times they don't know it.

texto: I don't even know what a traditional producer is or does. I feel like the job is like being a coach, building good work habits and building trust. You want to get to a point where you can say anything and talk about anything. There needs to be a real connection.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rick Rubin: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I don't even know what a traditional producer is or does. I feel like the job is like being a coa…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, work, good pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e good.
